notableEvents.label: Dansby Swanson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Dansby Swanson reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Ronny Mauricio.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Alex Bregman doubles (11) on a line drive to right fielder Carson Benge. Michael Conforto scores. Alex Bregman to 3rd. Alex Bregman advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder Carson Benge.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Francisco Alvarez reaches on a fielder's choice. Jared Young to 2nd. Jared Young advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by shortstop Dansby Swanson.

notableEvents.label: Carson Kelly pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carson Kelly lines out to center fielder A.J. Ewing. Pete Crow-Armstrong to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: A.J. Ewing GIDP
notableEvents.detail: A.J. Ewing grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to shortstop Dansby Swanson to first baseman Michael Busch. Francisco Alvarez out at 2nd. A.J. Ewing out at 1st.
